name: Loan for Any Purpose
description_short: The Knoxville, TN location of Loan For Any Purpose is at 4135 Asheville Hwy #25. Call +1 865-205-7013.
description_long:
Loan For Any Purpose is a direct lending storefront located at 3403 Grand River Ave in Detroit, Michigan, operating with extended hours (7am–8pm weekdays, 9am–6pm weekends). The company positions itself as an accessible lender for consumers seeking quick cash with minimal documentation and flexible credit requirements. The business operates under federal compliance standards, including USA PATRIOT Act verification procedures and non-traditional credit reporting inquiries that do not affect FICO scores. Their parent company or corporate office appears to be based in Atlanta, Georgia.

The company offers a diverse product suite designed for short-term financial needs: cash advances (under $1,000), payday loans (up to $1,000), same-day unsecured loans with minimal documentation, title loans secured by vehicle titles (up to $50,000), bad credit loans ($250–$50,000), installment loans ($1,000–$5,000), and personal loans (up to $50,000). All products explicitly welcome applicants with poor or no credit history, though personal loans recommend a higher credit score. Loan approval and funding timelines are accelerated, with same-day funding mentioned as available.

The company's distinguishing characteristics include its "all credit types welcome" marketing, acceptance of applicants typically rejected by traditional banks, the availability of title loans (a secured product), and the physical storefront model allowing in-person applications. The extended operating hours (including weekends) cater to working consumers. The disclaimer that qualification is not guaranteed and loan amounts may be lower than advertised reflects realistic lending practices, and the explicit recommendation that consumers with ongoing credit difficulties seek certified credit counseling demonstrates some consumer protection awareness.

Honestly, Loan For Any Purpose operates in the high-cost short-term lending space. While the website does not disclose interest rates, APRs, or fees, these products—particularly payday and title loans—typically carry rates well above 36% APR. The company explicitly states these products are for short-term needs only, not long-term borrowing. Consumers should approach such lenders as emergency-only options and compare alternatives like credit union PALs or employer advances before applying.
pros: Same-day or fast loan funding available for eligible applicants
Extended operating hours including weekends (9am–6pm Saturday and Sunday)
Accepts all credit types including bad credit; no credit score disqualification stated
Multiple product options ($250–$50,000 range) to match different loan sizes
Minimal documentation required for same-day loan products
Title loans available as alternative for borrowers with vehicles (up to $50,000)
In-person application option at physical storefront location
cons: No interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules disclosed on the website
Short-term lending products typically carry rates well above 36% APR in this category
Explicit disclaimer that qualification is not guaranteed and amounts may be lower than advertised
Company recommends borrowers with ongoing credit difficulties seek credit counseling elsewhere
Products are explicitly stated as short-term solutions, not suitable for long-term borrowing
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history needing immediate cash ($250–$1,000)
Vehicle owners seeking secured loans against their title in 1–2 days
Working adults needing loans outside traditional 9–5 business hours
Borrowers seeking installment loan structures ($1,000–$5,000) with flexible credit requirements
diagnosis: Loan For Any Purpose is best for consumers experiencing genuine financial emergencies who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans and need cash within 1–2 days. The critical caveat is that products in this category typically carry APRs well above 36%, making them expensive borrowing options suitable only for true short-term emergencies—not ongoing financial needs. Comparison with credit union PALs, employer advances, or other payday alternatives under 36% APR is strongly recommended before applying.
services: Same-day unsecured loans with minimal documentation
Title loans secured by vehicle title (up to $50,000)
In-person loan application at Detroit storefront
Verification of submitted information (may add up to 2 business days)
